Base_基础配置:
!
sysname {{ hostname }}
!
super password cipher {{ super_pass }}
!
clock timezone BJ add 08:00:00
!
aaa
 local-user {{ admin_user }} password cipher {{ admin_pass }}
 local-user {{ admin_user }} privilege level 15
 local-user {{ admin_user }} service-type terminal ssh http
 !
 local-user {{ oper_user }} password cipher {{ oper_pass }}
 local-user {{ oper_user }} privilege level 5
 local-user {{ oper_user }} service-type terminal ssh
 !
 local-user {{ escape_user }} password cipher {{ escape_pass }}
 local-user {{ escape_user }} privilege level 15
 local-user {{ escape_user }} service-type terminal ssh
!
undo telnet server enable
!
lldp enable
stp enable
password-recovery enable
transceiver unapproved-source enable
!
vlan {{ mgmt_vlan }}
 description MGMT_Management
!
interface Vlanif{{ mgmt_vlan }}
 ip address {{ mgmt_ip }} {{ mgmt_mask }}
!
